{{Quote|You are not Tsavong Lah's equal, but he sends his compliments. He believes the kintan strider death gambit to be the only worthy move in your infidel dejarik game.|Romm Zqar, to Borsk Fey'lya|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Star by Star">''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''</ref>}}
'''Romm Zqar''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]], in charge of the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|landings on Coruscant]] during the attack on the planet in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]. He was killed, along with 25,000 other Yuuzhan Vong [[Warrior caste|warriors]], by [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Borsk Fey'lya]]'s [[Dejarik/Legends|dejarik]]-inspired detonation blast, which was originally intended for [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]].
